curation_notes: The patch commit is a merge commit (c50bfff) that merged a security fix PR directly from the GHSA. The vulnerability location was derived from the patch diff: src/utils/parse.js contained an eval() call in the parse() function that executed any string starting with 'function' as JavaScript code. While 4 source files were changed (JsonTree.js, JsonFunctionValue.js, JsonNode.js, parse.js), only parse.js contained the actual vulnerability; the other files were modified to wire through a new allowFunctionEvaluation prop and use a safer functionToString helper.
